description: Explicit operating mode for an Article x Machine x Tool combination (e.g. standard / eco / high_quality / express). Klaus-configured, NOT algorithmically guessed (Konzept §16.1). The default case is exactly one mode named 'default' with is_default=true — no overhead. A SetupMode is the deliberate-setpoint axis of the Golden key; covariates like shift/hour are NOT modes (they are ConditioningEffects or at-query-time views). The Golden Data Set learns one posterior set per SetupMode.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Mode name (standard | eco | high_quality | express | default | ...)

attributes.name: parameters
attributes.description: Engineering setpoints for this mode, e.g. { spindle: 2400, feed: 0.15 }

attributes.name: frequency
attributes.description: Share of lots run in this mode (0..1)

attributes.name: is_default
attributes.description: True for the single-mode default case

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: proposed = system-suggested mode awaiting Klaus approval (§16.1)

relationships.description: The learned Golden posteriors for this mode
